packageRules.description: Pin Helm to v3.x - v4 breaks OCI tag validation for versions with '+' character (e.g., 108.0.0+up0.25.0-rc.0)
Pin semver/v3 to v3.3.0 - v3.4.0+ changed prerelease constraint evaluation breaking chart version validation
Pin mergo to v0.x - transitive via sql-migrate, go.mod replace pins to v0.3.16. Module renamed to dario.cat/mergo at v1.0.0.
